blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,582 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
